feature.name: Run-section config merge
feature.description: Extract coverage.py configuration reading and merging for the run section from rc files, environment, and constructor arguments.
included_behaviors: read .coveragerc and prefixed sections from setup.cfg or tox.ini
parse run include, omit, source, branch, and related list options
merge constructor kwargs and COVERAGE_* environment overrides
apply post-processing such as user path expansion
excluded_behaviors: coverage collection, data storage, and reporting
plugin loading and HTML/XML report sections beyond parsing

entanglement.description: Run configuration merges defaults, rc files, environment variables, and kwargs through INI and TOML parsers with shared helper utilities.
signals: section prefix handling across config file formats
environment variable substitution in option values

output.signature: read_run_config(config_file: bool | str = True, warn=None, **kwargs) -> CoverageConfig
